posts.author: JohnN
posts.title: We Asked AI To Show America Without Republicans

twitter.content: We Asked AI To Show America Without Republicans

posts.raw_content:
Met my first vaccine victim today. She's she kept talking about getting sick and I said what happened, what was it. She said it was some kind of immune deficiency disease.

She said she doesn't like to think of herself as a conspiracy theorist but it happened one month after she got vaccinated in 2021. Now she's pretty much crippled for life. 100% it was caused by the vaccine. Her doctor said he doesn't know how it happened it just happens. I don't know why we're letting these ghouls get off for what they did the untold pain that this shit shot caused.  Not everybody went willingly. Everyone was told it was safe and effective.  This isn't a conspiracy theory anymore it's 100% fact vac cine injuries and death from the covid shot is real where is the accountability. Fucking criminal cowards you're gonna burn in hell for what you did to people if you don't get accountability here on earth you will.  Congressman and senators of pieces of greedy fucking shit. Is this was real America we would have been marching on Washington years ago for what they did.

posts.title: The College Scam

twitter.content:
Our university "education" system is designed to sell student loans. It is not designed to teach career skills.

The average student changes their major three times and graduates in 5 1/2 years. 40% never graduate and only 22% to 30% use their degree in their eventual career.
